shortForecast: Light Rain Likely then Light Snow Likely
name: Today
detailedForecast: Rain likely before 4pm, then snow likely. Cloudy. High near 54, with temperatures falling to around 34 in the afternoon. West wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.
